json.title: Senior AI Developer
json.description_text:
Hello eager tech expert!
The OPEX Consultant tears apart, rebuilds and challenges. But between the reengineered process and the deployed solution, there is a critical role: someone who looks at the optimized process and sees the automation architecture who classifies opportunities into RPA, Intelligent Automation, and AI projects, and then builds and deploys those solutions at a speed that traditional development methods cannot match. 
This is not a traditional solutions architect or business analyst who writes requirements documents and hands them to a development team. This is an AI-native builder – someone who uses vibe coding and AI-assisted prototyping to go from concept to working prototype in days, not months. Someone who uses AI to generate test cases, who leverages LLMs for solution design, who builds bionic agents, and who treats AI not as a project category but as the development methodology itself. 
The Digital Solutions Consultant is the bridge between process opportunity and production-ready automation. Every solution they deliver must be built faster, smarter, and deployed leaner than anything a traditional development approach could achieve.
You’ll break new ground by
What You Will Do
The Digital Solutions Consultant takes the reengineered, waste-free processes produced by the OPEX Consultant and translates them into deployed automation solutions. The role owns the entire solution lifecycle – from concept mapping through solution design, rapid prototyping, testing, deployment, and stabilization – using AI at every stage to compress timelines by 60–80%. 
This person is into the right technology bucket (RPA for rule-based repetition, Intelligent Automation for semi-structured decisions, AI/ML for cognitive tasks), design the solution architecture, and drives rapid development using AI-native methods: vibe prototyping, AI-generated test cases, LLM-assisted design, and AI-powered sprint planning.
Areas & Tasks
1. Automation Opportunity Classification & Solution Mapping 
Receive reengineered process specifications from the OPEX Consultant and identify all automation opportunities within the optimized process 
Classify each opportunity into the right technology category: 
RPA: rule-based, repetitive, structured data, high-volume tasks suited for both automation 
Intelligent Automation (IA): semi-structured processes requiring document intelligence, decision logic, or workflow orchestration 
AI/ML: cognitive tasks requiring natural language processing, prediction, classification, conversational interfaces, or pattern recognition 
Build a solution concept map for each process: which components are RPA, which are IA, which are AI, and how they integrate into a cohesive automation architecture 
Prioritize automation opportunities based on complexity, impact, feasibility, and speed-to-deploy 
2. AI-Native Solution Design 
Design automation solutions using AI-assisted methods – not 40-page requirements documents, but rapid concept maps, architecture sketches, and interactive prototypes 
Use LLMs and generative AI to accelerate solution design: prompt-driven architecture exploration, AI-generated integration patterns, and automated design documentation 
Create solution designs that are modular, scalable, and integration-ready – designed for the enterprise, not for a demo 
Define data requirements, integration touchpoints, exception handling logic, and fallback mechanisms as part of every solution design 
3. Vibe Prototyping & Rapid Development 
Build working prototypes using vibe coding and AI-assisted development – concept to clickable prototype in days, not weeks 
Use AI code generation tools (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, or equivalent) to accelerate development of automation scripts, both workflows, and integration layers 
Develop proof-of-concept solutions that stakeholders can interact with early – eliminating the traditional gap between “design approved” and “first working version” 
Iterate rapidly based on stakeholder feedback – fail fast, learn fast, ship fast 
4. AI-Powered Testing & Quality Assurance 
Use AI to generate comprehensive test cases from solution designs and process specifications – not manual test script writing 
Deploy AI-assisted test automation for regression testing, edge case identification, and exception scenario coverage 
Validate AI/ML model outputs with appropriate accuracy, bias, and drift checks before production deployment 
Drive UAT with structured test plans that cover happy paths, exception paths, and integration scenarios 
5. Hands-On AI & Automation Build 
Build and configure RPA bots: attended and unattended automation workflows, orchestration, exception handling, and credential management 
Develop AI solutions: LLM-powered agents, intelligent document processing pipelines, NLP-based classification engines, conversational AI interfaces 
Design and deploy bionic agents – human-AI collaborative workflows where AI augments human decision-making rather than replacing it entirely 
Integrate automation solutions with enterprise platforms (Workday, ServiceNow, People Center, AskHR, and other H2R systems) 
6. AI-Powered Sprint Planning & Delivery 
Use AI tools for sprint planning: effort estimation, dependency mapping, backlog prioritization, and capacity allocation – replacing manual estimation rituals 
Run compressed development sprints (1–2 weeks) with AI-accelerated velocity – what traditional teams deliver in a sprint, this role delivers in half the time 
Maintain live solution delivery dashboards with real-time progress, blocker identification, and automated status reporting 
Coordinate with the PM on delivery governance, risk escalation, and go-live readiness 
7. Solution Deployment & Stabilization 
Drive production deployment with structured go-live checklists, rollback plans, and hyper care protocols 
Monitor deployed solutions for performance, accuracy, and stability – with automated alerting and drift detection for AI models 
Document deployed solutions with architecture diagrams, runbooks, and operational handover materials

json.description_html:
Hello eager tech expert!

The OPEX Consultant tears apart, rebuilds and challenges. But between the reengineered process and the deployed solution, there is a critical role: someone who looks at the optimized process and sees the automation architecture who classifies opportunities into RPA, Intelligent Automation, and AI projects, and then builds and deploys those solutions at a speed that traditional development methods cannot match.

This is not a traditional solutions architect or business analyst who writes requirements documents and hands them to a development team. This is an AI-native builder – someone who uses vibe coding and AI-assisted prototyping to go from concept to working prototype in days, not months. Someone who uses AI to generate test cases, who leverages LLMs for solution design, who builds bionic agents, and who treats AI not as a project category but as the development methodology itself.

The Digital Solutions Consultant is the bridge between process opportunity and production-ready automation. Every solution they deliver must be built faster, smarter, and deployed leaner than anything a traditional development approach could achieve.

You’ll break new ground by

What You Will Do

The Digital Solutions Consultant takes the reengineered, waste-free processes produced by the OPEX Consultant and translates them into deployed automation solutions. The role owns the entire solution lifecycle – from concept mapping through solution design, rapid prototyping, testing, deployment, and stabilization – using AI at every stage to compress timelines by 60–80%.

This person is into the right technology bucket (RPA for rule-based repetition, Intelligent Automation for semi-structured decisions, AI/ML for cognitive tasks), design the solution architecture, and drives rapid development using AI-native methods: vibe prototyping, AI-generated test cases, LLM-assisted design, and AI-powered sprint planning.

Areas & Tasks

1. Automation Opportunity Classification & Solution Mapping

  • Receive reengineered process specifications from the OPEX Consultant and identify all automation opportunities within the optimized process
    • Classify each opportunity into the right technology category:
    • RPA: rule-based, repetitive, structured data, high-volume tasks suited for both automation
    • Intelligent Automation (IA): semi-structured processes requiring document intelligence, decision logic, or workflow orchestration
    • AI/ML: cognitive tasks requiring natural language processing, prediction, classification, conversational interfaces, or pattern recognition
    • Build a solution concept map for each process: which components are RPA, which are IA, which are AI, and how they integrate into a cohesive automation architecture
    • Prioritize automation opportunities based on complexity, impact, feasibility, and speed-to-deploy

2. AI-Native Solution Design

  • Design automation solutions using AI-assisted methods – not 40-page requirements documents, but rapid concept maps, architecture sketches, and interactive prototypes
  • Use LLMs and generative AI to accelerate solution design: prompt-driven architecture exploration, AI-generated integration patterns, and automated design documentation
  • Create solution designs that are modular, scalable, and integration-ready – designed for the enterprise, not for a demo
  • Define data requirements, integration touchpoints, exception handling logic, and fallback mechanisms as part of every solution design

3. Vibe Prototyping & Rapid Development

  • Build working prototypes using vibe coding and AI-assisted development – concept to clickable prototype in days, not weeks
  • Use AI code generation tools (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, or equivalent) to accelerate development of automation scripts, both workflows, and integration layers
  • Develop proof-of-concept solutions that stakeholders can interact with early – eliminating the traditional gap between “design approved” and “first working version”
  • Iterate rapidly based on stakeholder feedback – fail fast, learn fast, ship fast

4. AI-Powered Testing & Quality Assurance

  • Use AI to generate comprehensive test cases from solution designs and process specifications – not manual test script writing
  • Deploy AI-assisted test automation for regression testing, edge case identification, and exception scenario coverage
  • Validate AI/ML model outputs with appropriate accuracy, bias, and drift checks before production deployment
  • Drive UAT with structured test plans that cover happy paths, exception paths, and integration scenarios

5. Hands-On AI & Automation Build

  • Build and configure RPA bots: attended and unattended automation workflows, orchestration, exception handling, and credential management
  • Develop AI solutions: LLM-powered agents, intelligent document processing pipelines, NLP-based classification engines, conversational AI interfaces
  • Design and deploy bionic agents – human-AI collaborative workflows where AI augments human decision-making rather than replacing it entirely
  • Integrate automation solutions with enterprise platforms (Workday, ServiceNow, People Center, AskHR, and other H2R systems)

6. AI-Powered Sprint Planning & Delivery

  • Use AI tools for sprint planning: effort estimation, dependency mapping, backlog prioritization, and capacity allocation – replacing manual estimation rituals
  • Run compressed development sprints (1–2 weeks) with AI-accelerated velocity – what traditional teams deliver in a sprint, this role delivers in half the time
  • Maintain live solution delivery dashboards with real-time progress, blocker identification, and automated status reporting
  • Coordinate with the PM on delivery governance, risk escalation, and go-live readiness

7. Solution Deployment & Stabilization

  • Drive production deployment with structured go-live checklists, rollback plans, and hyper care protocols
  • Monitor deployed solutions for performance, accuracy, and stability – with automated alerting and drift detection for AI models
  • Document deployed solutions with architecture diagrams, runbooks, and operational handover materials
  • Support knowledge transfer to operational support teams for long-term sustainable

Key Responsibilities

  • Support the design and maintenance of ontologies (OWL/RDF/SKOS) under guidance of senior engineers.
  • Assist in implementing and updating the Enterprise Knowledge Graph.
  • Help build and maintain data pipelines for integrating enterprise data from systems like SAP and Workday.
  • Collaborate with Data and AI Engineers to optimize semantic context for LLMs and AI-driven workflows.
  • Contribute to the integration of knowledge graphs with AI technologies, including LLMs and vector databases.
  • Learn and apply semantic modeling standards and governance practices.
  • Work as part of cross-functional teams and engage in continuous learning.

You’re excited to build on your existing expertise, including:

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • 6–12 years in digital solutions, automation engineering, or AI/ML solution delivery with progressive hands-on experience
  • Minimum 3 years of hands-on RPA development or solution architecture on at least one major platform
  • Minimum 2 delivered AI/ML projects: LLM applications, IDP, NLP, conversational AI, predictive analytics, or classification engines
  • Demonstrable experience with AI-assisted development tools (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, Replit Agent, or equivalent)
  • Experience building bionic agents or human-AI collaborative workflows
  • Proficiency in at least one programming language (Python strongly preferred) and familiarity with API integrations
  • Experience in HR technology landscape, H2R processes, or enterprise automation programs

Strongly Preferred

  • Experience with LLM orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, Semantic Kernel, or equivalent)
  • Familiarity with enterprise AI platforms (Azure AI, AWS Bedrock, Google Vertex AI)
  • Experience with intelligent document processing platforms (ABBYY, UiPath Document Understanding, Azure AI Document Intelligence)
  • Knowledge of responsible AI practices: bias detection, explainability, model governance
  • Experience in GBS / multi-geography shared services automation programs

Create a better #TomorrowWithUs!

We value your unique identity and perspective and are fully committed to providing equitable opportunities and building a workplace that reflects the diversity of society. Come bring your authentic self and create a better tomorrow with us.

This role is based in Bangalore. But you’ll also get to visit other locations in India and globe, so you’ll need to go where this journey takes you. In return, you’ll get the chance to work with teams impacting entire cities, countries and the shape of things to come. We’re Siemens. A collection of over 379,000 minds building the future, one day at a time in over 200 countries. We're dedicated to equality, and we welcome applications that reflect the diversity of the communities we work in. All employment decisions at Siemens are based on qualifications, merit and business need. Bring your curiosity and creativity and help us craft tomorrow.

json.title: AI Specialist-TL
json.description_text:
Job Title: AI Specialist – Team Leader
Location: Chromepet, Chennai
Experience: 2–4 Years
Employment Type: Full-Time
Job Summary
We are seeking a highly skilled AI Specialist – Team Leader with 2–4 years of experience, specializing in modern AI platforms, LLMs, and secure AI application development. The ideal candidate will lead AI initiatives, build intelligent solutions, and ensure data security and compliance while integrating AI into business systems.
Core Focus: AI Platform & Tools Expertise (Primary Requirement)
Strong hands-on experience with leading AI platforms such as ChatGPT, Claude, GitHub Copilot, and similar tools
Solid understanding of MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers and AI integrations
Expertise in prompt engineering, context design, and workflow optimization
Proven experience in customizing, fine-tuning, and deploying AI/LLM models
Hands-on experience building AI-powered applications, copilots, and automation tools
Strong knowledge of LLM APIs, embeddings, vector databases, and RAG architectures
Ability to evaluate and adopt emerging AI platforms
Data Security & Compliance (Mandatory Requirement)
Strong understanding of data security principles in AI applications
Experience in handling sensitive and confidential data securely
Knowledge of data encryption (at rest and in transit) and secure API integrations
Familiarity with access control, authentication, and authorization mechanisms
Understanding of data privacy regulations and compliance standards (e.g., GDPR concepts, enterprise security practices)
Experience implementing secure AI pipelines and protecting data in LLM workflows
Awareness of AI risks such as data leakage, prompt injection, and model misuse
Ability to design secure, scalable, and compliant AI solutions
Key Responsibilities
Analyze business needs and design secure AI-driven solutions
Lead and mentor a team focused on AI and intelligent automation
Develop and deploy AI/ML and LLM-based applications
Integrate AI solutions into enterprise systems securely
Optimize models for performance, scalability, and security
Work with SQL, PL/SQL, and Oracle APEX for integration and reporting
Required Technical Skills
Strong programming skills in Python
Knowledge of NLP, Computer Vision, or Data Analytics
Strong understanding of SQL and PL/SQL
Basic knowledge of Oracle APEX (preferred)
Experience in team leadership or mentoring
Qualifications
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, AI, Data Science, or a related field
Key Competencies
Strong leadership and communication skills
Excellent problem-solving and analytical thinking
Ability to work independently and drive innovation
Strong focus on security, quality, and best practices
Work Location
Chromepet, Chennai
Pay: From ₹300,000.00 per year
Benefits:
Cell phone reimbursement
Food provided
Health insurance
Paid sick time
Paid time off
Provident Fund
Work Location: In person

json.title: Databricks Consultant (AI and Data Solutions)
json.description_text:
Experience: 4+ Years
Location: [Remote]
Employment Type: Full-Time
Job Summary
We are seeking a skilled Databricks Consultant with 4+ years of experience to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and data solutions on the Databricks platform. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience in AI agent development using Agent Bricks, machine learning workflows, and advanced analytics leveraging the Databricks ecosystem. This role involves building intelligent data pipelines, developing AI-powered agents, and optimizing data platforms for enterprise use cases.
Key Responsibilities
Design and implement AI-driven solutions on the Databricks platform.
Develop and deploy AI agents using Agent Bricks and Databricks AI capabilities.
Build and maintain data pipelines using Databricks, Spark, and Delta Lake.
Develop and operationalize machine learning models using Databricks ML and MLflow.
Integrate LLM-based AI agents with enterprise data sources and applications.
Optimize data workflows and performance within Databricks environments.
Collaborate with data engineers, data scientists, and business stakeholders to translate requirements into scalable AI solutions.
Implement best practices for data governance, security, and model lifecycle management.
Monitor and maintain AI models and agent-based workflows in production environments.
Provide technical guidance and support for Databricks-based AI implementations.
Required Skills & Qualifications
4+ years of experience in Data Engineering, Data Science, or AI development.
Strong hands-on experience with Databricks platform.
Proficiency in Python, PySpark, and SQL.
Experience building AI agents using Agent Bricks or similar agent frameworks.
Experience with Apache Spark and distributed data processing.
Hands-on experience with Delta Lake, Databricks Workflows, and Unity Catalog.
Experience with ML lifecycle management using MLflow.
Familiarity with LLMs, Generative AI, and AI orchestration frameworks.
Strong understanding of data architecture and cloud data platforms.
Preferred Qualifications
Experience with Databricks Mosaic AI / AI Functions / Vector Search.
Experience with LLM integration, RAG architectures, or conversational AI.
Hands-on experience with Azure Databricks, AWS Databricks, or GCP Databricks.
Knowledge of LangChain, LlamaIndex, or agent-based AI architectures.
Databricks certifications such as Databricks Data Engineer Associate/Professional.
Nice to Have
Experience building enterprise AI copilots or automation agents.
Exposure to MLOps, CI/CD pipelines, and model monitoring.
Knowledge of data governance and compliance frameworks.
Job Types: Full-time, Permanent
Pay: Up to ₹1,200,000.00 per year
Benefits:
Health insurance
Internet reimbursement
Work from home
Application Question(s):
Do you have experience working with AI agents or Generative AI solutions?
Experience:
Databricks: 4 years (Required)
Python: 3 years (Required)
PySpark: 3 years (Preferred)
Work Location: Remote

json.title: Senior Data Scientist, Vice President
json.description_text:
Job Description: 
Job Title: Senior Data Scientist, Vice President 
Location: Bangalore, India 
Role Description 
As a Senior Data Science Leader, you will analyse, interpret, and derive actionable insights from extremely large and complex datasets using Google Cloud Platform (GCP). A central focus of this role is understanding how trades flow through the bank at scale whilst leveraging statistical and analytical methodologies to: identify bottlenecks, anomalies, categorise system/client/user behaviour, and identify efficiency opportunities across the trade lifecycle. 
You will work closely with business, tech, and product partners to translate complex business questions into robust statistical investigations that deliver measurable impact. Where solutions are meaningful, repeatable, and actionable there is scope to extend the role to deploy AI/ML solutions to take preventative actions. 
Development of data pipelines and deploying code to production is managed by the wider engineering team. 
What we’ll offer you 
As part of our flexible scheme, here are just some of the benefits that you’ll enjoy 
Best in class leave policy 
Gender neutral parental leaves 
100% reimbursement under childcare assistance benefit (gender neutral) 
Sponsorship for Industry relevant certifications and education 
Employee Assistance Program for you and your family members 
Comprehensive Hospitalization Insurance for you and your dependents 
Accident and Term life Insurance 
Complementary Health screening for 35 yrs. and above 
Your key responsibilities 
Analyse trade‑flow datasets end‑to‑end to identify trends, inefficiencies, anomalies, and behavioural shifts 
Combine market data with internal trade data to detect signal, regime changes, or operational risk patterns 
Build scalable analytical workflows using GCP tools (primarily BigQuery and Dataflow) 
Develop forecasting and predictive‑analytics models to support capacity planning, operational readiness, and risk mitigation 
Work with business, tech, and product teams to frame ambiguous analytical questions and propose structured approaches 
Communicate insights through clear narratives, dashboards, and visualisations tailored to financial‑markets stakeholders 
Apply rigorous statistical techniques to validate findings, ensuring reproducibility and business relevance 
Optimise analytical workloads for performance, scalability, and cost efficiency in GCP 
Contribute to data quality, metadata management, and analytics standards for trade‑related data 
Collaborate with engineering teams to productionise repeatable analytical workflows 
Explore opportunities to evolve analytics into preventative AI/ML tooling where patterns indicate actionable interventions 
Your skills and experience 
Leading data science for the program, collaborating with others to understand requirements, design, validate, & implement solutions, development of junior colleagues in the team 
Strong statistical and analytical background, with expertise/interest in: 
Time‑series analysis, forecasting, trend decomposition 
Clustering, segmentation, and regime‑shift detection 
Anomaly and outlier detection across trade and market datasets 
Predictive modelling and exploratory data analysis (EDA) 
Strong interest in markets and investment banking , including: 
Trade lifecycle concepts 
Market microstructure 
Trading behaviours and execution patterns 
Expertise in Python (Pandas, NumPy, SciPy, StatsModels, PySpark) 
Strong SQL skills, including experience with very large datasets 
Hands‑on experience with Google Cloud Platform , especially: 
BigQuery 
Vertex AI (for analytics tooling and optional model development) 
Looker/BI tools for analytical storytelling 
Experience working with distributed data‑processing frameworks 
Familiarity with ML, AI techniques, and Agentic frameworks is a bonus but not the primary focus 
Experience with data pipelines and orchestration tools (Cloud Composer, Cloud Run) for automated analytics workflows 
Strong data visualisation capabilities (Python plotting, Looker, Tableau) 
Experience applying rigorous statistical methods (hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, validation frameworks) 
How we’ll support you 
Training and development to help you excel in your career 
Coaching and support from experts in your team 
A culture of continuous learning to aid progression 
A range of flexible benefits that you can tailor to suit your needs 
About us and our teams 
Please visit our company website for further information: 
https://www.db.com/company/company.html 
We strive for a culture in which we are empowered to excel together every day. This includes acting responsibly, thinking commercially, taking initiative and working collaboratively. 
Together we share and celebrate the successes of our people. Together we are Deutsche Bank Group. 
We welcome applications from all people and promote a positive, fair and inclusive work environment.

json.title: UX Engineer
json.description_text:
Hello Talented Techie!
To tackle the biggest challenges of our time, we need inquisitive minds with ambition to make the impossible possible. Siemens is your place to thrive, challenge the status quo, make a difference, and grow into a team of innovators who share your passion for tech. Are you in?
We are looking for: UX Designer
You aspire to be a complete Creator who can come up with brilliant ideas AND help to make it. Coming from a development background, you become comfortable with co-creating new UI designs, implementing technical prototypes, and rapidly make improvements in short cycles. The mission of our UXD team is to investigate, invent, prove, and evolve advanced UX concepts with an eye towards new trends in the use of AI in helping people to be more productive and content. The challenge is to quickly find the "right thing to build" by focusing on validating UX concepts and solving design issues early. 
You’ll make a difference by: 
Work closely with our Customer Success team and Design Teams to build prototypes and innovative application experiences for our users
Collect customer feedback and thrive to provide the best user experience
To understand customer issues/needs, work with UI developers to root cause and provide solutions
Support core product UI Developers
Build reusable and adaptable components design
Optimize UI for the best performance, quality and efficiency
Work on Bug fixes, Fit & Finish and UI enhancements
Work alongside and learn from a talented group of engineers with a diverse range of experiences and backgrounds
Need to have a good command over HTML, CSS and JavaScript .
You’ll win us over by: 
Lives and breathes the user-centered design and the design thinking process.
Knowledge of the energy and/or utility industry, e.g. you know what KWH means and how you're paying for electricity
Knowledge of rapid implementation tools and techniques.
Experience with design tools for low fidelity (e.g. Figma, Balsamiq) and high fidelity (e.g. Adobe XD, Invision).
Adept at crafting adaptive layouts that maintain usability on varying screen resolutions.

You’d describe yourself as:
BE in Computer Science or equivalent
4 - 6 years of experience in designing modern
Strong Analytical and Problem-Solving Skills.
Expert-level knowledge of CSS3, including Flexbox, Grid, animations, transitions, custom variables, and media queries.
Hands‑on experience fixing UI inconsistencies, cross‑browser issues, responsive layout bugs, and pixel‑perfect styling.
Ability to improve and refactor existing UI code for maintainability and scalability.
Ability to convert Figma/Sketch designs into clean, semantic, production-ready HTML/CSS.
Create a better #TomorrowWithUs
This position is based in Noida, where you'll collaborate with teams working on solutions that shape cities, communities, and the future of technology.
We at Siemens are committed to equality and welcome applicants from a diverse set of backgrounds. All hiring decisions are based on qualifications, merits, and business need. Bring your curiosity, creativity, and passion—and help us shape tomorrow.
Learn more about careers at Siemens: www.siemens.com/careers
json.description_html:
Hello Talented Techie!

To tackle the biggest challenges of our time, we need inquisitive minds with ambition to make the impossible possible. Siemens is your place to thrive, challenge the status quo, make a difference, and grow into a team of innovators who share your passion for tech. Are you in?

We are looking for: UX Designer

You aspire to be a complete Creator who can come up with brilliant ideas AND help to make it. Coming from a development background, you become comfortable with co-creating new UI designs, implementing technical prototypes, and rapidly make improvements in short cycles. The mission of our UXD team is to investigate, invent, prove, and evolve advanced UX concepts with an eye towards new trends in the use of AI in helping people to be more productive and content. The challenge is to quickly find the "right thing to build" by focusing on validating UX concepts and solving design issues early.

You’ll make a difference by:

  • Work closely with our Customer Success team and Design Teams to build prototypes and innovative application experiences for our users
  • Collect customer feedback and thrive to provide the best user experience
  • To understand customer issues/needs, work with UI developers to root cause and provide solutions
  • Support core product UI Developers
  • Build reusable and adaptable components design
  • Optimize UI for the best performance, quality and efficiency
  • Work on Bug fixes, Fit & Finish and UI enhancements
  • Work alongside and learn from a talented group of engineers with a diverse range of experiences and backgrounds
  • Need to have a good command over HTML, CSS and JavaScript .

You’ll win us over by:

  • Lives and breathes the user-centered design and the design thinking process.
  • Knowledge of the energy and/or utility industry, e.g. you know what KWH means and how you're paying for electricity
  • Knowledge of rapid implementation tools and techniques.
  • Experience with design tools for low fidelity (e.g. Figma, Balsamiq) and high fidelity (e.g. Adobe XD, Invision).
  • Adept at crafting adaptive layouts that maintain usability on varying screen resolutions.


You’d describe yourself as:

  • BE in Computer Science or equivalent
  • 4 - 6 years of experience in designing modern
  • Strong Analytical and Problem-Solving Skills.
  • Expert-level knowledge of CSS3, including Flexbox, Grid, animations, transitions, custom variables, and media queries.
  • Hands‑on experience fixing UI inconsistencies, cross‑browser issues, responsive layout bugs, and pixel‑perfect styling.
  • Ability to improve and refactor existing UI code for maintainability and scalability.

Create a better #TomorrowWithUs

This position is based in Noida, where you'll collaborate with teams working on solutions that shape cities, communities, and the future of technology.

json.title: Test Automation Engineer – GenAI (Automatic Domain Sensitive Test Case Generation)
json.normalizedTitle: test automation engineer – genai (automatic domain sensitive test case generation)
json.description_text:
Hello Visionary! 
We empower our people to stay resilient and relevant in a constantly changing world. We’re looking for people who are always searching for creative ways to grow and learn. People who want to make a real impact, now and in the future. Does that sound like you? Then it seems like you’d make a great addition to our vibrant international team. 
We are looking for: Test Automation Engineer 
You’ll break new ground by: 
Test Artifacts (AI‑assisted) Auto-generate test cases from requirements, user stories, acceptance criteria.
Use prompting and using techniques such as RAG to produce scenarios, edge cases, negative tests and maintain requirement traceability.
Build scalable automation frameworks (Playwright/Selenium/etc).
Implement AI-driven code generation for page objects, test classes, data builders.
Integrate synthetic test data generation.
Integrate AI-assisted test reviews into Azure DevOps/GitHub Actions.
Implement quality gates and dashboards (Allure/Extent/Power BI).
Build prompt templates, guardrails, post-processing validators.
Implement RAG pipelines using specs, docs, historical defects.
Ensure privacy & compliance for all AI workflows.
You’re excited to build on your existing expertise, including: 
A bachelors’ degree in IT, Engineering, or a related quantitative field. 
3 to 8 years in QA automation and 1 to 2 years with GenAI.
Strong skills in Playwright/Selenium/Appium.
Skilled in TypeScript/Java/Python/C#.
Experience with CI/CD, Git, prompting.
Strong understanding of API testing, SDLC, test design techniques.
Create a better #TomorrowWithUs! 
This role is based in Bangalore, where you’ll get the chance to work with teams impacting entire cities, countries - and the shape of things to come. 
We value your unique identity and perspective and are fully committed to providing equitable opportunities and building a workplace that reflects the diversity of society. Come bring your authentic self and create a better tomorrow with us.
We’re Siemens. A collection of over 312,000 minds building the future, one day at a time in over 200 countries. We're dedicated to equality, and we encourage applications that reflect the diversity of the communities we work in. All employment decisions at Siemens are based on qualifications, merit and business need. Bring your curiosity and imagination and help us shape tomorrow. 
Find out more about Siemens careers at: www.siemens.com/careers
Find out more about the Digital world of Siemens here: 
www.siemens.com/careers/digitalminds

json.title: Senior Data Scientist, AVP
json.description_text:
Job Description: 
Job Title: Senior Data Scientist, AVP 
Location: Bangalore, India 
Role Description 
As a Senior Data Science Leader, you will analyse, interpret, and derive actionable insights from extremely large and complex datasets using Google Cloud Platform (GCP). A central focus of this role is understanding how trades flow through the bank at scale whilst leveraging statistical and analytical methodologies to: identify bottlenecks, anomalies, categorise system/client/user behaviour, and identify efficiency opportunities across the trade lifecycle. 
You will work closely with business, tech, and product partners to translate complex business questions into robust statistical investigations that deliver measurable impact. Where solutions are meaningful, repeatable, and actionable there is scope to extend the role to deploy AI/ML solutions to take preventative actions. 
Development of data pipelines and deploying code to production is managed by the wider engineering team. 
What we’ll offer you 
As part of our flexible scheme, here are just some of the benefits that you’ll enjoy 
Best in class leave policy 
Gender neutral parental leaves 
100% reimbursement under childcare assistance benefit (gender neutral) 
Sponsorship for Industry relevant certifications and education 
Employee Assistance Program for you and your family members 
Comprehensive Hospitalization Insurance for you and your dependents 
Accident and Term life Insurance 
Complementary Health screening for 35 yrs. and above 
Your key responsibilities 
Analyse trade‑flow datasets end‑to‑end to identify trends, inefficiencies, anomalies, and behavioural shifts 
Combine market data with internal trade data to detect signal, regime changes, or operational risk patterns 
Build scalable analytical workflows using GCP tools (primarily BigQuery and Dataflow) 
Develop forecasting and predictive‑analytics models to support capacity planning, operational readiness, and risk mitigation 
Work with business, tech, and product teams to frame ambiguous analytical questions and propose structured approaches 
Communicate insights through clear narratives, dashboards, and visualisations tailored to financial‑markets stakeholders 
Apply rigorous statistical techniques to validate findings, ensuring reproducibility and business relevance 
Optimise analytical workloads for performance, scalability, and cost efficiency in GCP 
Contribute to data quality, metadata management, and analytics standards for trade‑related data 
Collaborate with engineering teams to productionise repeatable analytical workflows 
Explore opportunities to evolve analytics into preventative AI/ML tooling where patterns indicate actionable interventions 
Your skills and experience 
Leading data science for the program, collaborating with others to understand requirements, design, validate, & implement solutions, development of junior colleagues in the team 
Strong statistical and analytical background, with expertise/interest in: 
Time‑series analysis, forecasting, trend decomposition 
Clustering, segmentation, and regime‑shift detection 
Anomaly and outlier detection across trade and market datasets 
Predictive modelling and exploratory data analysis (EDA) 
Strong interest in markets and investment banking , including: 
Trade lifecycle concepts 
Market microstructure 
Trading behaviours and execution patterns 
Expertise in Python (Pandas, NumPy, SciPy, StatsModels, PySpark) 
Strong SQL skills, including experience with very large datasets 
Hands‑on experience with Google Cloud Platform , especially: 
BigQuery 
Vertex AI (for analytics tooling and optional model development) 
Looker/BI tools for analytical storytelling 
Experience working with distributed data‑processing frameworks 
Familiarity with ML, AI techniques, and Agentic frameworks is a bonus but not the primary focus 
Experience with data pipelines and orchestration tools (Cloud Composer, Cloud Run) for automated analytics workflows 
Strong data visualisation capabilities (Python plotting, Looker, Tableau) 
Experience applying rigorous statistical methods (hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, validation frameworks) 
How we’ll support you 
Training and development to help you excel in your career 
Coaching and support from experts in your team 
A culture of continuous learning to aid progression 
A range of flexible benefits that you can tailor to suit your needs 
About us and our teams 
Please visit our company website for further information: 
https://www.db.com/company/company.html 
We strive for a culture in which we are empowered to excel together every day. This includes acting responsibly, thinking commercially, taking initiative and working collaboratively. 
Together we share and celebrate the successes of our people. Together we are Deutsche Bank Group. 
We welcome applications from all people and promote a positive, fair and inclusive work environment.

json.title: Senior AI/ML Engineer
json.description_text:
AI/ML Engineer
Experience: 5+yrs
Location: Coimbatore
Education: Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or a related field.
Immediate or 30 days notice period candidates are highly prepared.
mail: manikandan.v@cognitica.ai
Job Description: AI/ML Engineer (Computer Vision & LLM)
We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated to join our AI team. As a key member, you will play a pivotal role in the development and implementation of cutting-edge solutions across computer vision and large language models (LLMs) for diverse applications.
Your expertise will drive innovation in image/video analysis, object detection, facial recognition, and LLM-based solutions like Vector RAG, CoT, and ReAct (Agentic) workflows.
Responsibilities
Computer Vision:
* Develop and implement computer vision algorithms and models to address complex challenges in image and video analysis.
* Utilize libraries like OpenCV, Dlib, and frameworks like TensorFlow, Keras, and PyTorch.
Implement state-of-the-art algorithms, including YOLO (version 5+), Faster R-CNN, CNN, SORT, Deep-SORT, and Mask R-CNN.
* Work on facial feature extraction and optimization for real-world applications.
Large Language Models (LLMs):
* Design and implement Vector RAG pipelines, focusing on Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and ReAct (Agentic) methods.
* Utilize and fine-tune LLMs like OpenAI GPT, Gemini, Claude, or similar models.
* Develop and test prompt engineering strategies to maximize model performance.
* Work with libraries such as Transformers, Hugging Face, and LangChain to build scalable solutions.
* Implement chunking techniques, manage embeddings, and ensure seamless integration with vector databases.
General AI/ML Responsibilities:
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define requirements and deliver robust solutions.
* Optimize and deploy AI models on cloud platforms like AWS, GCP, or Azure.
Requirements
Core Skills:
* Expertise in computer vision algorithms and libraries such as OpenCV, Dlib, and TensorFlow/Keras/PyTorch.
* Proficiency with algorithms like YOLO (v5+), Faster R-CNN, Mask R-CNN, and DeepSORT.
* Hands-on experience with LLM models like OpenAI GPT, Claude, Gemini, or similar.
* Knowledge of fine-tuning, embeddings, and chunking techniques for large datasets.
* Familiarity with vector databases such as Pinecone, Milvus, or Weaviate.
* Strong skills in Python and related libraries (NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Scikit-learn, Seaborn).
Preferred Skills:
* Experience with LangChain and Hugging Face Transformers.
* Familiarity with DevOps practices and CI/CD workflows for AI/ML deployments.
* Knowledge of optimization techniques for inference, including quantization and pruning.
* Exposure to Reinforcement Learning, edge computing, and GANs.
Job Types: Full-time, Permanent
Pay: ₹300,000.00 - ₹1,400,000.00 per year
Benefits:
Paid sick time
Provident Fund
Work Location: In person

json.title: Assoc, P3, Software Eng III : Job Level - Associate
json.normalizedTitle: assoc, p3, software eng iii : job level - associate
json.description_text:
We are looking for a Data Engineer (3-5 years) with strong Python programming skills and hands-on experience building modern data platforms using Snowflake, dbt, and Apache Airflow. You will design and develop reliable data pipelines, model and transform data for analytics, and collaborate using Git-based workflows to deliver high-quality, production-ready data solutions. Experience with Power BI and exposure to AI/ML use cases is a plus. 

Key Responsibilities 
Design, build, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT pipelines using Apache Airflow (DAG design, scheduling, monitoring, retries, alerting). 
Develop and optimize cloud data warehousing solutions on Snowflake (schemas, performance tuning, clustering/partitioning strategies where applicable, cost awareness). 
Implement analytics engineering best practices using dbt: 
Data modeling (star/snowflake schemas, dimensional modeling) 
Reusable macros, tests, documentation, and lineage 
Environment management (dev/test/prod) 
Write clean, efficient, and maintainable Python code for data ingestion, transformation, orchestration, and automation tasks. 
Ensure data quality and reliability through validation, automated testing, and observability/monitoring. 
Use Git-based workflows (branching, PRs, code reviews) and contribute to CI/CD practices for data pipelines and dbt projects. 
Troubleshoot pipeline failures, resolve data issues, and continuously improve performance and stability. Required Qualifications 
3-5 years of professional experience in Data Engineering or related roles. 
Hands-on experience with Snowflake, dbt, and Apache Airflow in production or enterprise environments. 
Strong programming skills in Python (data processing, APIs, automation, packaging, best practices). 
Solid understanding of data engineering concepts: 
ETL/ELT patterns, orchestration, batch processing (and streaming familiarity is a plus) 
Data modeling, warehousing concepts, and SQL optimization 
Strong SQL skills and experience working with large datasets. 
Working knowledge of Git-based development workflows (feature branches, pull requests, reviews, merging strategies). 

Good to Have (Preferred Skills) 
Experience building dashboards or semantic models with Power BI. 
Exposure to AI/ML concepts or enabling AI use cases (feature datasets, data prep for model training/inference, LLM/AI pipeline awareness). 
Kafka (integration / streaming support) 
Great Expectations (data quality checks / validation framework) 

Soft Skills 
Strong problem-solving and debugging abilities. 
Good communication skills and ability to work cross-functionally. 
Ownership mindset with attention to data quality, reliability, and documentation. 
WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT FROM MORGAN STANLEY: 
At Morgan Stanley, we raise, manage and allocate capital for our clients – helping them reach their goals. We do it in a way that’s differentiated – and we’ve done that for 90 years. Our values - putting clients first, doing the right thing, leading with exceptional ideas, committing to diversity and inclusion, and giving back - aren’t just beliefs, they guide the decisions we make every day to do what's best for our clients, communities and more than 80,000 employees in 1,200 offices across 42 countries. At Morgan Stanley, you’ll find an opportunity to work alongside the best and the brightest, in an environment where you are supported and empowered. Our teams are relentless collaborators and creative thinkers, fueled by their diverse backgrounds and experiences. We are proud to support our employees and their families at every point along their work-life journey, offering some of the most attractive and comprehensive employee benefits and perks in the industry. There’s also ample opportunity to move about the business for those who show passion and grit in their work. 
To learn more about our offices across the globe, please copy and paste https://www.morganstanley.com/about-us/global-offices into your browser. 
Morgan Stanley is an equal opportunity employer committed to building and maintaining a workforce that is diverse in experience and background. Our recruiting efforts reflect our strong commitment to a culture of inclusion, where individuals are hired, developed, and advanced based on their skills and talents. 
Our workforce reflects a broad cross-section of the global communities in which we operate, bringing a variety of backgrounds, talents, perspectives, and experiences. 
For more information, please visit: https://www.morganstanley.com/people-opportunities/eeo .

Our recruiting efforts reflect our strong commitment to a culture of inclusion, where individuals are hired, developed, and advanced based on their skills and talents.

Our workforce reflects a broad cross-section of the global communities in which we operate, bringing a variety of backgrounds, talents, perspectives, and experiences.

For more information, please visit: https://www.morganstanley.com/people-opportunities/eeo .

json.title: Senior Data Scientist - Product & Agentic Intelligence
json.normalizedTitle: senior data scientist - product & agentic intelligence
json.description_text:
The Company
PayPal has been revolutionizing commerce globally for more than 25 years. Creating innovative experiences that make moving money, selling, and shopping simple, personalized, and secure, PayPal empowers consumers and businesses in approximately 200 markets to join and thrive in the global economy.
We operate a global, two-sided network at scale that connects hundreds of millions of merchants and consumers. We help merchants and consumers connect, transact, and complete payments, whether they are online or in person. PayPal is more than a connection to third-party payment networks. We provide proprietary payment solutions accepted by merchants that enable the completion of payments on our platform on behalf of our customers.
We offer our customers the flexibility to use their accounts to purchase and receive payments for goods and services, as well as the ability to transfer and withdraw funds. We enable consumers to exchange funds more safely with merchants using a variety of funding sources, which may include a bank account, a PayPal or Venmo account balance, PayPal and Venmo branded credit products, a credit card, a debit card, certain cryptocurrencies, or other stored value products such as gift cards, and eligible credit card rewards. Our PayPal, Venmo, and Xoom products also make it safer and simpler for friends and family to transfer funds to each other. We offer merchants an end-to-end payments solution that provides authorization and settlement capabilities, as well as instant access to funds and payouts. We also help merchants connect with their customers, process exchanges and returns, and manage risk. We enable consumers to engage in cross-border shopping and merchants to extend their global reach while reducing the complexity and friction involved in enabling cross-border trade.
Our beliefs are the foundation for how we conduct business every day. We live each day guided by our core values of Inclusion, Innovation, Collaboration, and Wellness. Together, our values ensure that we work together as one global team with our customers at the center of everything we do – and they push us to ensure we take care of ourselves, each other, and our communities.
Job Summary:
What do you need to know about the role

We are looking for a Senior Data Scientist to lead product measurement, machine learning model development, and agentic solution delivery across our core product surfaces. You will own the full data science lifecycle — from metric definition and experiment design through model deployment and autonomous pipeline development — in a high-scale fintech environment.
This is a senior individual contributor role with high visibility and cross-functional scope, working closely with product and engineering teams.
Job Description:
Essential Responsibilities: 
Lead the development and implementation of advanced data science models.
Collaborate with stakeholders to understand requirements.
Drive best practices in data science.
Ensure data quality and integrity in all processes.
Mentor and guide junior data scientists.
Stay updated with the latest trends in data science.
Minimum Qualifications:
3+ years relevant experience and a Bachelor’s degree OR Any equivalent combination of education and experience.
Additional Responsibilities & Preferred Qualifications:
Key Responsibilities
Lead product experimentation — design A/B tests, switchback experiments, and quasi-experimental studies
Architect agentic pipelines that automate diagnostics, anomaly escalation, and experiment root-cause workflows
Partner with Product and Engineering to translate complex ML outputs into actionable decisions and executive-ready narratives
Establish and enforce experiment instrumentation standards — ensuring cross-arm comparability and metadata governance
Own end-to-end ML model lifecycle — from problem scoping and data exploration through training, validation, and production deployment
Build production feature pipelines supporting both real-time and batch scoring paths at scale
Mentor junior data scientists and drive team-wide best practices in model development, deployment, and responsible AI evaluation
Minimum Qualifications
Bachelors in computer science, Statistics, Applied Mathematics, or a related field; Masters preferred
5+ years of applied data science or ML engineering experience in industry
2+ years shipping and maintaining production ML models at scale
Strong Python and distributed SQL proficiency (BigQuery or equivalent)
Demonstrated ownership of product metrics and experiment programs
Preferred Qualifications
Masters or PhD in computer science, Statistics, Applied Mathematics, or a related field
Prior experience in fintech, payments, identity, or authentication domains
Experience in identifying opportunities in product improvement
Experience in Statistical Causal inference and Classification models
Hands-on work building or deploying LLM-based agents in a production environment
Familiarity with experiment metadata governance and instrumentation frameworks
Strong communication and presentation skills

Subsidiary:
PayPal
Travel Percent:
0
PayPal does not charge candidates any fees for courses, applications, resume reviews, interviews, background checks, or onboarding. When making an application directly, we will never ask you to share passwords, one-time passcodes (OTP), or verification codes. Any such request is a red flag and likely part of a scam. All communication regarding your application will come from official PayPal email domains. If you suspect fraudulent activity, please report it immediately. To learn more about how to identify and avoid recruitment fraud please visit https://careers.pypl.com/contact-us.
For the majority of employees, PayPal's balanced hybrid work model offers 3 days in the office for effective in-person collaboration and 2 days at your choice of either the PayPal office or your home workspace, ensuring that you equally have the benefits and conveniences of both locations.
Our Benefits:
At PayPal, we’re committed to building an equitable and inclusive global economy. And we can’t do this without our most important asset-you. That’s why we offer comprehensive, choice-based programs, to support all aspects of personal wellbeing—physical, emotional, and financial—delivering meaningful value where it matters most. We strive to create a flexible, balanced work culture with a holistic approach to benefits, including generous paid time off, healthcare coverage for you and your family, and resources to create financial security and support your mental health.
Who We Are:

Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion 
PayPal provides equal employment opportunity (EEO) to all persons regardless of age, color, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, race, religion, creed, gender, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, genetic information, marital status, status with regard to public assistance, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law. In addition, PayPal will provide reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities. If you are unable to submit an application because of incompatible assistive technology or a disability, please contact us at paypalglobaltalentacquisition@paypal.com.
Belonging at PayPal:
Our employees are central to advancing our mission, and we strive to create an environment where everyone can do their best work with a sense of purpose and belonging. Belonging at PayPal means creating a workplace with a sense of acceptance and security where all employees feel included and valued. We are proud to have a diverse workforce reflective of the merchants, consumers, and communities that we serve, and we continue to take tangible actions to cultivate inclusivity and belonging at PayPal.
Any general requests for consideration of your skills, please Join our Talent Community. 
We know the confidence gap and imposter syndrome can get in the way of meeting spectacular candidates. Please don’t hesitate to apply.

json.title: Lead Windows Systems Engineer
json.description_text:
Bengaluru, Karnataka
Job ID JR2026505456 Category Information Technology Role Type Hybrid Post Date Apr. 16, 2026

Job Description
At Boeing, we innovate and collaborate to make the world a better place. We’re committed to fostering an environment for every teammate that’s welcoming, respectful and inclusive, with great opportunity for professional growth. Find your future with us.
Overview
As a leading global aerospace company, Boeing develops, manufactures and services commercial airplanes, defense products and space systems for customers in more than 150 countries. As a top U.S. exporter, the company leverages the talents of a global supplier base to advance economic opportunity, sustainability and community impact. Boeing’s team is committed to innovating for the future, leading with sustainability, and cultivating a culture based on the company’s core values of safety, quality and integrity.
Technology for today and tomorrow
The Boeing India Engineering & Technology Center (BIETC) is a 5500+ engineering workforce that contributes to global aerospace growth. Our engineers deliver cutting-edge R&D, innovation, and high-quality engineering work in global markets, and leverage new-age technologies such as AI/ML, IIoT, Cloud, Model-Based Engineering, and Additive Manufacturing, shaping the future of aerospace.
People-driven culture
At Boeing, we believe creativity and innovation thrives when every employee is trusted, empowered, and has the flexibility to choose, grow, learn, and explore. We offer variable arrangements depending upon business and customer needs, and professional pursuits that offer greater flexibility in the way our people work. We also believe that collaboration, frequent team engagements, and face-to-face meetings bring together different perspectives and thoughts – enabling every voice to be heard and every perspective to be respected. No matter where or how our teammates work, we are committed to positively shaping people’s careers and being thoughtful about employee wellbeing.
With us, you can create and contribute to what matters most in your career, community, country, and world. Join us in powering the progress of global aerospace.
Find your future with us
Boeing seeking a skilled LeadWindows Systems Engineer to join our team. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience with Microsoft Windows updates, scripting, virtualization, and endpoint management tools. This role requires strong technical expertise in Windows operating systems, automation, and deployment technologies to support and enhance our IT infrastructure.
Good communication skills are needed both verbally and written, to Interact with peers and customers. Job requires the ability to work well with others on a team as well as independently. Job requires working within a diverse team of skilled and motivated co-workers to collaborate on results. Other qualities for this candidate are a positive attitude, self-motivated, the ability to work in a fast-paced, demanding environment, and the ability to adapt to changing priorities.
This role will be based out of Bangalore, India.
Position Responsibilities:
Manage and compile Microsoft Windows updates, including SSU and LCU packages
.
Develop, maintain, and troubleshoot scripts using PowerShell, BAT/CMD, VBS, and XML
.
Utilize Git for version control and collaboration on code and configuration files
.
Analyze and interpret VBS scripts to support automation and system management tasks
.
Monitor and troubleshoot client Windows operating systems, including event logs, RDP sessions, and command-line operations
.
Deploy and manage localized Virtual Desktop instances using Hyper-V and VirtualBox
.
Create and manage ISO files using DOS and PowerShell scripting
.
Administer and support endpoint management solutions such as Microsoft Intune and Autopilot in production environments
.
Utilize Workspace ONE for device management and security (knowledge of Workspace ONE is desired)
.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless integration and deployment of Windows-based solutions
.
Work Environment:
This position may require occasional on-call support and collaboration with global teams
.
Work is primarily performed in an office environment with some remote work flexibility
.
Employer will not sponsor applicants for employment visa status.
Basic Qualifications (Required Skills/Experience):
A Bachelor’s degree or higher is required as a BASIC QUALIFICATION
.
Strong knowledge of Microsoft Windows updates, including SSU and LCU compiling
.
Proficient in Git, XML, PowerShell, and BAT/CMD scripting
.
Strong ability to parse and understand VBS code
.
Thorough knowledge of client Windows operating systems, including event logs, RDP, and command-line tools
.
Experience with localized Virtual Desktop instances (Hyper-V/VirtualBox)
.
Ability to create ISO files using DOS and PowerShell
.
Experience using Microsoft Intune and Autopilot in a production environment
.
Knowledge of Workspace ONE is a plus
.
Preferred Qualifications (Desired Skills/Experience):
Relevant certifications in Microsoft technologies or endpoint management
.
Experience with automation and configuration management tools
.
Strong problem-solving and communication skills
.
Typical Education & Experience:
Education/experience typically acquired through advanced technical education (e.g. Bachelor) 12 to 16 years' related work experience or an equivalent combination of education and experience
.
Relocation:
This position does offer relocation within INDIA
.

Applications for this position will be accepted until May. 02, 2026

Export Control Requirements: 
This is not an Export Control position.
Education 
Bachelor's Degree or Equivalent Required
Relocation 
This position offers relocation based on candidate eligibility.
Visa Sponsorship 
Employer will not sponsor applicants for employment visa status.
Shift 
Shift 2 - Afternoon (India)

Equal Opportunity Employer:
We are an equal opportunity employer. We do not accept unlawful discrimination in our recruitment or employment practices on any grounds including but not limited to; race, color, ethnicity, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, physical or mental disability, genetic factors, military and veteran status, or other characteristics covered by applicable law.
We have teams in more than 65 countries, and each person plays a role in helping us become one of the world’s most innovative, diverse and inclusive companies. We are proud members of the Valuable 500 and welcome applications from candidates with disabilities. Applicants are encouraged to share with our recruitment team any accommodations required during the recruitment process. Accommodations may include but are not limited to: conducting interviews in accessible locations that accommodate mobility needs, encouraging candidates to bring and use any existing assistive technology such as screen readers and offering flexible interview formats such as virtual or phone interviews.

Your Benefits
No matter where you are in life, our benefits help prepare you for the present and the future.
Competitive base pay and incentive programs.
Industry-leading tuition assistance program pays your institution directly.
Resources and opportunities to grow your career.
Up to $10,000 match when you support your favorite nonprofit organizations.

json.title: Data Scientist

location.streetAddress: Chennai,IN-TN,India

json.description_text:
Req ID: 365753 

NTT DATA strives to hire exceptional, innovative and passionate individuals who want to grow with us. If you want to be part of an inclusive, adaptable, and forward-thinking organization, apply now. 

We are currently seeking a Data Scientist to join our team in Chennai, Tamil Nādu (IN-TN), India (IN). 

Job Duties: NTT is seeking a Data Scientist / ML engineer with 4+ years of experience. This person should be comfortable with the following: - Driving new data insights to uncover business opportunities revenue streams. - Have a firm understanding of statistics and data visualization for communication. - Has an understanding of business growth areas how to utilize important data. - Be responsible for identifying new analytic trends/ data needs and repeatable analytic solutions. - Able to work with key stakeholders to generate hypotheses and create analytic models that answer impactful business questions - Identifies, analyzes and interprets trends or patterns in complex data sets using various supervised and unsupervised ML algorithms such as regression, classification or clustering ML approaches where applicable. - Be experienced in Data Wrangling and Dynamic Model Tuning. Key Responsibilities: • Working on projects leveraging your expertise in data science, artificial-intelligence and machine learning • Assist in breaking down complex business problems, developing solutions, and delivering with a high degree of focus on client satisfaction. • Conduct market research, develop a point-of-view and communicate effectively back to clients and stakeholders. • Bring innovative thinking, resourcefulness leveraging best practices and creativity to achieve successful client outcomes. • Establish relationships with our clients at the appropriate levels, gain an understanding of the project work and problems encountered. • Work with data sets of varying degrees of size and complexity including both structured and unstructured data. • Piping and processing massive data-streams in distributed computing environments. • Implement batch and real-time model scoring. • Assemble large, complex data sets that meet functional / non-functional business requirements. • Apply business knowledge to analyze data, develop reports and solve problems ·Perform ad hoc analyses of data depending on business needs. • Participate in the analysis and resolution of issues related to information flow and content with data stakeholders. Basic Qualifications: • 4+ years of experience supporting data science projects in a consulting environment. • 4+ year(s) of experience participating in projects that focused on one or more of the following areas: o Predictive Analytics o Data Design o Statistics o AI/ML o ML Ops • 3+ years of experience using Python and/or R to analyze disparate datasets. • Ability to travel at least 25%. Preferred Skills: • Master’s degree preferred. • Exercises sound judgment with minimal support from practice executives through structured problem identification, mitigation, and resolution. • You are a team player that is a consistent, dependable performer with an excellent work ethic, flexible ""can-do"" attitude, and a commitment to success. • Professional verbal and written communication. • Undergraduate or Graduate degree preferred Minimum Skills Required: Basic Qualifications: • 4+ years of experience supporting data science projects in a consulting environment. • 4+ year(s) of experience participating in projects that focused on one or more of the following areas: o Predictive Analytics o Data Design o Statistics o AI/ML o ML Ops • 3+ years of experience using Python and/or R to analyze disparate datasets. • Ability to travel at least 25% 

About NTT DATA 

NTT DATA is a $30 billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune Global 100. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through responsible innovation. We are one of the world's leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with unmatched capabilities in enterprise-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and application services. our consulting and Industry solutions help organizations and society move confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more than 50 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as established and start-up partners. NTT DATA is a part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each year in RD. 

Whenever possible, we hire locally to NTT DATA offices or client sites. This ensures we can provide timely and effective support tailored to each client’s needs. While many positions offer remote or hybrid work options, these arrangements are subject to change based on client requirements. For employees near an NTT DATA office or client site, in-office attendance may be required for meetings or events, depending on business needs. At NTT DATA, we are committed to staying flexible and meeting the evolving needs of both our clients and employees. NTT DATA recruiters will never ask for payment or banking information and will only use @nttdata.com and @talent.nttdataservices.com email addresses. If you are requested to provide payment or disclose banking information, please submit a contact us form, https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact-us. 

NTT DATA endeavors to make https://us.nttdata.com accessible to any and all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please contact us at https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact-us. This contact information is for accommodation requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications. NTT DATA is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. For our EEO Policy Statement, please click here. If you'd like more information on your EEO rights under the law, please click here. For Pay Transparency information, please click here.
json.description_html:
Req ID: 365753

NTT DATA strives to hire exceptional, innovative and passionate individuals who want to grow with us. If you want to be part of an inclusive, adaptable, and forward-thinking organization, apply now.

We are currently seeking a Data Scientist to join our team in Chennai, Tamil Nādu (IN-TN), India (IN).

Job Duties: NTT is seeking a Data Scientist / ML engineer with 4+ years of experience. This person should be comfortable with the following: - Driving new data insights to uncover business opportunities revenue streams. - Have a firm understanding of statistics and data visualization for communication. - Has an understanding of business growth areas how to utilize important data. - Be responsible for identifying new analytic trends/ data needs and repeatable analytic solutions. - Able to work with key stakeholders to generate hypotheses and create analytic models that answer impactful business questions - Identifies, analyzes and interprets trends or patterns in complex data sets using various supervised and unsupervised ML algorithms such as regression, classification or clustering ML approaches where applicable. - Be experienced in Data Wrangling and Dynamic Model Tuning. Key Responsibilities: • Working on projects leveraging your expertise in data science, artificial-intelligence and machine learning • Assist in breaking down complex business problems, developing solutions, and delivering with a high degree of focus on client satisfaction. • Conduct market research, develop a point-of-view and communicate effectively back to clients and stakeholders. • Bring innovative thinking, resourcefulness leveraging best practices and creativity to achieve successful client outcomes. • Establish relationships with our clients at the appropriate levels, gain an understanding of the project work and problems encountered. • Work with data sets of varying degrees of size and complexity including both structured and unstructured data. • Piping and processing massive data-streams in distributed computing environments. • Implement batch and real-time model scoring. • Assemble large, complex data sets that meet functional / non-functional business requirements. • Apply business knowledge to analyze data, develop reports and solve problems ·Perform ad hoc analyses of data depending on business needs. • Participate in the analysis and resolution of issues related to information flow and content with data stakeholders. Basic Qualifications: • 4+ years of experience supporting data science projects in a consulting environment. • 4+ year(s) of experience participating in projects that focused on one or more of the following areas: o Predictive Analytics o Data Design o Statistics o AI/ML o ML Ops • 3+ years of experience using Python and/or R to analyze disparate datasets. • Ability to travel at least 25%. Preferred Skills: • Master’s degree preferred. • Exercises sound judgment with minimal support from practice executives through structured problem identification, mitigation, and resolution. • You are a team player that is a consistent, dependable performer with an excellent work ethic, flexible ""can-do"" attitude, and a commitment to success. • Professional verbal and written communication. • Undergraduate or Graduate degree preferred Minimum Skills Required: Basic Qualifications: • 4+ years of experience supporting data science projects in a consulting environment. • 4+ year(s) of experience participating in projects that focused on one or more of the following areas: o Predictive Analytics o Data Design o Statistics o AI/ML o ML Ops • 3+ years of experience using Python and/or R to analyze disparate datasets. • Ability to travel at least 25%

About NTT DATA

NTT DATA is a $30 billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune Global 100. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through responsible innovation. We are one of the world's leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with unmatched capabilities in enterprise-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and application services. our consulting and Industry solutions help organizations and society move confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more than 50 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as established and start-up partners. NTT DATA is a part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each year in RD.

Whenever possible, we hire locally to NTT DATA offices or client sites. This ensures we can provide timely and effective support tailored to each client’s needs. While many positions offer remote or hybrid work options, these arrangements are subject to change based on client requirements. For employees near an NTT DATA office or client site, in-office attendance may be required for meetings or events, depending on business needs. At NTT DATA, we are committed to staying flexible and meeting the evolving needs of both our clients and employees. NTT DATA recruiters will never ask for payment or banking information and will only use @nttdata.com and @talent.nttdataservices.com email addresses. If you are requested to provide payment or disclose banking information, please submit a contact us form, https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact-us.

NTT DATA endeavors to make https://us.nttdata.com accessible to any and all users. If you would like to contact us regarding the accessibility of our website or need assistance completing the application process, please contact us at https://us.nttdata.com/en/contact-us. This contact information is for accommodation requests only and cannot be used to inquire about the status of applications. NTT DATA is an equal opportunity employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status.
